debug_info.goal:
Ident : Type u_1
ε : @Graphiti.FinEnv Ident (String × String)
a : List String
⊢ ∃ b,
    a.length = b.length ∧
      (∀ (a' b' : String), (a', b') ∈ a.zip b → ¬Batteries.AssocList.contains (a', b') ε = true) ∧ (a.zip b).Nodup

failed_attempts:
let rec keys {α β} (l : Batteries.AssocList α β) : List α :=
    match l with
    | .nil => []
    | .cons k _ t => k :: keys t

  have h_contains : ∀ k, ε.contains k ↔ k ∈ keys ε := by
    intro k
    induction ε with
    | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, keys]
    | cons k' v t ih =>
      simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, keys]
      split <;> simp [*]

  let rec max_len (l : List String) : Nat :=
    match l with
    | [] => 0
    | s :: ss => Nat.max s.length (max_len ss)

  have max_len_spec : ∀ s l, s ∈ l → s.length ≤ max_len l := by
    intros s l h
    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [max_len] at *
      cases h with
      | inl h => subst s; apply Nat.le_max_left
      | inr h => apply Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)

  let fresh (l : List String) : String :=
    String.mk (List.replicate (max_len l + 1) 'x')

  have fresh_prop : ∀ l, fresh l ∉ l := by
    intro l h
    have hlen : (fresh l).length = max_len l + 1 := by simp [fresh]
    have hle := max_len_spec _ _ h
    rw [hlen] at hle
    apply Nat.not_succ_le_self _ hle

  induction a with
  | nil =>
    exists []
    simp
  | cons head tail ih =>
    obtain ⟨btail, hlen, hfresh, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let forbidden := (keys ε ++ tail.zip btail).filter (λ p => p.1 == head) |> List.map (λ p => p.2)
    let new_b := fresh forbidden
    exists new_b :: btail
    simp [hlen]
    constructor
    · intros a' b' hin
      simp at hin
      cases hin with
      | inl h =>
        rw [h]; simp; rw [h_contains]
        intro hcon
        have : new_b ∈ forbidden := by
          simp [forbidden]
          exists (head, new_b)
          simp [hcon]
        apply fresh_prop _ this
      | inr h =>
        apply hfresh _ _ h
    · constructor
      · intro hin
        have : new_b ∈ forbidden := by
          simp [forbidden]
          exists (head, new_b)
          simp [hin]
        apply fresh_prop _ this
      · exact hnodup
